message.content: {"edges": [{"source": "Healthy eating", "target": "Culture of eating that promotes healthy choices"}, {"source": "Mental well-being", "target": "Emotional eating"}, {"source": "Physical well-being", "target": "Aesthetics"}, {"source": "Stress", "target": "Aesthetics"}, {"source": "Supportive food environment", "target": "Culture of eating that promotes healthy choices"}, {"source": "Availability of healthy foods", "target": "Socio-economic status"}, {"source": "Cost of healthy foods", "target": "Socio-economic status"}, {"source": "Cost of unhealthy foods", "target": "Socio-economic status"}, {"source": "Marketing of healthy foods", "target": "Public health messaging around thinness"}, {"source": "Marketing of unhealthy foods", "target": "Public health messaging around thinness"}, {"source": "Poor body image", "target": "Eating disorders"}, {"source": "Depression", "target": "Mental well-being"}, {"source": "Weight bias", "target": "Obesity"}]}
